reason: Verify final work remains scoped and preserves expected behavior.
Verify API/source/test layering and iCTS package boundaries after edits.
Verify runtime dependencies are bound at API/flow boundaries and narrow inputs are used lower down.
Verify refactor quality, naming, and absence of unnecessary abstractions.
Verify explicit status propagation and no silent CTS success paths remain.
Verify diagnostics use project logging/error conventions instead of ad hoc console output.
Verify implementation addresses the audited architecture findings.
Verify implementation does not regress prior runtime boundary cleanup.
Verify implementation remains compatible with prior CMake architecture direction.
Verify implementation does not reintroduce static archive duplication sensitivity.
